title: Core pandas Workflow for Data Analysis
description: A flowchart illustrating the typical workflow when using pandas for data science tasks, from data acquisition to analysis and visualization.
relationships: Data is loaded INTO a DataFrame
DataFrame is processed THROUGH cleaning methods (e.g., dropna, fillna)
Clean data is used FOR analysis (e.g., groupby, mean)
Results are sent TO output (e.g., to_csv, matplotlib)
